cover.title: Student Loan Scheme (Repayment Threshold for 2024–25 Tax Year and Subsequent Tax Years) Regulations 2023

made.heading: Order in Council
made.made.at: At Wellington this 18th day of December 2023
made.made.present: Present:The Right Hon Christopher Luxon presiding in Council

para.text: These regulations are made under section 215(1)﻿(a) of the Student Loan Scheme Act 2011 on the advice and with the consent of the Executive Council.
These regulations are the Student Loan Scheme (Repayment Threshold for 2024–25 Tax Year and Subsequent Tax Years) Regulations 2023.
These regulations come into force on 1 April 2024.
The amount of the annual repayment threshold for the 2024–25 tax year commencing on 1 April 2024 and subsequent tax years is $24,128.
The Student Loan Scheme (Repayment Threshold for 2023–24 Tax Year and Subsequent Tax Years) Regulations 2022 (SL 2022/316) are revoked.

citation.leg-title: Student Loan Scheme (Repayment Threshold for 2023–24 Tax Year and Subsequent Tax Years) Regulations 2022

signature-block.sig.para: Rachel Hayward,Clerk of the Executive Council.

explnote.heading: Explanatory note
explnote.explnote.subhead2: This note is not part of the regulations, but is intended to indicate their general effect.

para.text: These regulations, which come into force on 1 April 2024, increase the annual repayment threshold for the purposes of the Student Loan Scheme Act 2011 from $22,828 to $24,128.
These regulations also revoke the Student Loan Scheme (Repayment Threshold for 2023–24 Tax Year and Subsequent Tax Years) Regulations 2022.

promulgation.issue-authority: Issued under the authority of the Legislation Act 2019.
promulgation.gazette-date: Date of notification in Gazette: 21 December 2023.
promulgation.admin-office: These regulations are administered by the Inland Revenue Department.
